projects.name: Nova
projects.description:
Nova is the most secure ADC & DDoS mitigation service available online, created by myself and the Umbra team to protect our servers. It serves about 4.1 billion requests monthly, and is currently active on 42 domains and 82 total services with 99.98% uptime. As Team Lead of the project, I ensure the effectiveness and quality of the service by overseeing (1) the development team, (2) the hiring of new talented developers, and (3) the front-end of the service itself.

Impact: In June, Nova protected our service against a DDoS attack of 2.4 Gbps of HTTP traffic (≈2 million HTTP requests per second). Normal site visitors were unaffected, and damage to the servers themselves was completely avoided.

Join us: Nova is currently in closed beta. If you own a site with <1000 regular users and wish to participate in the beta, we will be happy to protect your site for free for two weeks and allow you to experience how amazing our service is, and only then will we provide you with a quota. Please get in contact.

projects.name: Crypvault
platforms: and anywhere else you can get a web browser
projects.description: An open-sourced digital asset manager which keeps your cryptocurrencies safe from thieves via extremely secure biometrics. Runs in your web browser.

projects.name: Quality Assurance @ Roblox
projects.description: As an official Roblox Developer Modules Quality Assurance team member, I work closely with the Roblox Team, testing internal products to prevent mistakes and defects and avoid problems when shipping final products to the platform. I provide confidence that quality requirements will be fulfilled, and prevent unfinished products from reaching the general playerbase.

projects.name: Umbra
projects.description: A powerful scripting API and artificial neural network application which allows you to deobfuscate and modify internal Roblox engine code, update any typically restricted values you wish to, and publish your changes on the fly. Above all else, we're a community that stands for free speech and a free Internet for all. Serving ≈{bUsers} premium users and ≈{bDkUsers} developers (and counting).

projects.name: Umbra Cloud
projects.description: The open-source, self-scaling cloud hosting platform that we use to publish user-generated content created on the Umbra development platform. Umbra Cloud's infrastructure is open source and freely available to everyone.

projects.name: Umbra Launchpad
projects.description: The custom Umbra launcher platform which allows it to run undetected, making it impossible to be spotted by other players, in-game moderators, and even Roblox's own administrators. The hub to manage your account and any scripts that you've uploaded using Umbra Cloud, our free cloud hosting platform.

projects.name: Umbra External Purchase API
projects.description: An API which allows you to accept in-script purchases from external payment providers - namely Square, Google Pay (and Apple Pay on macOS) - without leaving the game. Whenever a user wishes to purchase something, a pop-up window is created, requiring minimal effort from the user. This is impossible in vanilla Roblox.

projects.name: gba.js.org
projects.description: GBA Online is a light-weight online emulator for the GameBoy Advance. It's hosted online at gba.js.org.
